Feng Dan (È¶ÆÁ¥û), styledShaozhou, was born in Anping. Close to Sima Yan and part of Jia Chong‚Äôs clique. Opposed Yang Hu‚Äôs proposal to attack Wu. Feng Dan was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Feng Dan lived during the Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
